_comment: Flight phase detection rules and ATC state machine guards. phase_thresholds define sensor values for FlightPhase transitions. hysteresis prevents phase jitter with time delays. intent_preconditions block invalid pilot intents based on current flight phase (e.g., taxi request while airborne) with configurable rejection messages. auto_corrections fix state/phase mismatches after a delay (e.g., airborne after departure clearance -> auto-transition to PATTERN_ENTRY). intent_frequency restricts which intents are valid on which frequency type (GROUND, TOWER, UNICOM). pilot_phraseology provides example phrases per intent for UI display.

INITIAL_CALL_GROUND.rejection_airborne: {callsign}, negativ, Sie sind in der Luft. Melden Sie Ihre Absichten.

INITIAL_CALL_TOWER.rejection_airborne: {callsign}, Sie sind bereits in der Luft, melden Sie Ihre Position.

INITIAL_CALL_INBOUND.rejection_ground: {callsign}, negativ, Sie scheinen am Boden zu sein.

INITIAL_CALL_INBOUND_VRP.rejection_ground: {callsign}, negativ, Sie scheinen am Boden zu sein.

INITIAL_CALL_APPROACH.rejection_ground: {callsign}, negativ, Sie scheinen am Boden zu sein.

REQUEST_TAXI.rejection_airborne: {callsign}, negativ, Sie sind in der Luft.

REQUEST_TAXI_PARKING.rejection_airborne: {callsign}, negativ, Sie sind in der Luft.

READY_FOR_DEPARTURE.rejection_airborne: {callsign}, Sie sind bereits in der Luft.

READY_FOR_DEPARTURE_VFR.rejection_airborne: {callsign}, Sie sind bereits in der Luft.

REPORT_POSITION.rejection_ground: {callsign}, negativ, Sie scheinen am Boden zu sein.

REPORT_POSITION_DOWNWIND.rejection_ground: {callsign}, negativ, Sie scheinen am Boden zu sein.

REPORT_POSITION_BASE.rejection_ground: {callsign}, negativ, Sie scheinen am Boden zu sein.

REPORT_POSITION_FINAL.rejection_ground: {callsign}, negativ, Sie scheinen am Boden zu sein.

REQUEST_LANDING.rejection_ground: {callsign}, negativ, Sie scheinen am Boden zu sein.

REQUEST_TOUCH_AND_GO.rejection_ground: {callsign}, negativ, Sie scheinen am Boden zu sein.

RUNWAY_VACATED.rejection_airborne: {callsign}, negativ, Sie scheinen noch in der Luft zu sein.

LEAVING_FREQUENCY.rejection_ground: {callsign}, negativ, Sie sind noch am Boden.

on_tower_freq.log: pilot tuned Tower while taxi-cleared, advancing handoff
pilot tuned Tower from GROUND_CONTACT, advancing

REQUEST_TAXI.rejection: {callsign}, rufen Sie Ground fuer die Rollanweisung.

REQUEST_TAXI_PARKING.rejection: {callsign}, rufen Sie Ground zum Rollen ans Vorfeld.

REQUEST_FLIGHT_FOLLOWING.rejection: {callsign}, Flight Following ist hier nicht verfuegbar.

REPORT_POSITION.rejection: {callsign}, rufen Sie Tower fuer die Positionsmeldung.

REPORT_POSITION_DOWNWIND.rejection: {callsign}, rufen Sie Tower fuer die Positionsmeldung.

REPORT_POSITION_BASE.rejection: {callsign}, rufen Sie Tower fuer die Positionsmeldung.

REPORT_POSITION_FINAL.rejection: {callsign}, rufen Sie Tower fuer die Positionsmeldung.

REQUEST_TOUCH_AND_GO.rejection: {callsign}, rufen Sie Tower fuer Aufsetzen und Durchstarten.

pilot_phraseology.READY_FOR_DEPARTURE_VFR: {airport} Tower, {callsign}, Piste {runway}, abflugbereit, Kurs nach Plan

_state_machine_guards_comment: Tables consumed by atc_state_machine::process. state_frequency_validity: when current freq doesn't match the listed states for that freq type, atc_state_machine resets to IDLE. idle_redirects: in IDLE state, a matching intent + freq combo emits the configured response and stays in IDLE. state_reverts: pilot re-issues an intent while in `in_state` -> revert to `revert_to` so the request reroutes. tower_only_auto_advance: at airports with no Ground controller, the listed states auto-advance after the standard taxi handoff. frequency_hint: rendered when freq_type is UNKNOWN at a towered airport.

idle_redirects.log: REQUEST_TAXI on Tower freq -> redirect to ground
READY_FOR_DEPARTURE on Ground freq -> redirect to tower

state_reverts.log: Re-clearance: reverting Pattern/DEPARTURE_CLEARED -> TOWER_CONTACT for re-evaluation
Re-clearance: reverting XC/DEPARTURE_CLEARED -> TOWER_CONTACT for re-evaluation

frequency_hint.ground_response: {callsign}, Sie sind nicht auf der korrekten Frequenz. Rufen Sie {airport} Ground auf {ground_frequency}.
frequency_hint.tower_response: {callsign}, Sie sind nicht auf der korrekten Frequenz. Rufen Sie {airport} Tower auf {tower_frequency}.
